CoursesPage.title: Courses
CoursesPage.description: Browse and manage personalized learning paths.
CoursesPage.emptyDescription: Create your first manual course to start shaping the learning path.

NewCoursePage.title: What do you want to learn?
NewCoursePage.description: Describe your goal and Build My Course will generate a personalized course with modules and lessons.
NewCoursePage.cardDescription: Example: "I want to learn React to get a frontend job."

GenerateCourseForm.goalPlaceholder: I want to learn React well enough to get a frontend job.

CourseDetailsPage.deleteDialogTitle: Are you sure you want to delete this course?
CourseDetailsPage.markLessonIncompleteTitle: Mark this lesson as not completed?
CourseDetailsPage.markLessonDescription: You can change this again later.
CourseDetailsPage.noModulesDescription: This course does not have modules yet.
